chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 683 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No.3251/2019 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.3252/2019 01.10.2025 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar advocate for the applicant Ms. Dilkhurram Shaheen, advocate for respondent By consent the impugned judgment is set aside and the matter is remanded back to the Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge ‘Amjad
